name: Energous Corp
business: Energous develops and sells over-the-air Wireless Power Network (WPN) technology including transmitter systems, receiver integrated circuits, and supporting software for battery-free IoT devices in retail, industrial, healthcare, and logistics environments.

exposures.sentence: Our WPN technology consists of transmitter systems, receiver integrated circuits, and supporting software designed to deliver power and data to battery-free IoT devices across a range of operating distances and power levels.
Applications include retail sensors, electronic shelf labels (ESLs), asset trackers, air quality monitors, motion detectors, and other monitoring solutions.
We categorize our target markets based on deployments of our WPN platform across transmitter systems and receiver-enabled devices used in commercial and industrial IoT applications.

We have developed scalable, over-the-air Wireless Power Network (WPN) technology that integrates advanced semiconductor chipsets, software controls, hardware designs, and antenna systems to enable radio frequency (RF)-based charging for ambient Internet of Things (IoT) devices, transforming supply chain capabilities from limited tracking to overall business intelligence.

PowerBridge transmitter systems are deployed in environments such as retail locations, warehouses, fulfillment centers, healthcare facilities, and other enterprise settings to support battery-free IoT applications.
Device Type Application RF Tags Cold Chain, Asset Tracking, Medical IoT

catalysts.event: Introduction of battery-free e-Sense tag and e-Compass cloud-based software platform
catalysts.sentence: In the second quarter of 2025, we introduced the battery-free e-Sense tag and the e-Compass cloud-based software platform, which together supported the first end-to-end wireless power-enabled IoT device monitoring and management solution.

catalysts.event: Completion of regulatory process for PowerBridge Pro across all EU member states and UK
catalysts.sentence: on December 16, 2025, we announced completion of the regulatory process for our PowerBridge Pro across all EU member states and the UK, enabling commercialization there.

catalysts.event: Completion of regulatory process for PowerBridge LITE in multiple countries
catalysts.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we announced completion of the regulatory process for our PowerBridge LITE [formerly known as the 1W transmitter] wireless charging technology in the U.S., Canada, Europe, India, China, UK, Korea, Australia and New Zealand.

catalysts.event: International regulatory approvals in over 110 countries
catalysts.sentence: As of March 15, 2026, products integrating our WPT technology had received international regulatory approvals in over 110 countries.
